ModMetaData.name: Odyssey Shuttle Variants
ModMetaData.author: Luke
ModMetaData.description:
Expands the Odyssey transport-shuttle system with a family of buildable, role-distinct craft - Troop, Cargo, Heavy Cargo, Mechanitor (Biotech) and an autonomous Transport Drone (Biotech) - plus the vanilla Passenger Shuttle folded into the same system.
Each craft carries colonists, mechs and cargo as INDEPENDENT capacity pools (typed capacity), instead of vanilla's single shared mass limit, with clear load-dialog readouts. The Transport Drone flies with no crew: send it anywhere, land and hold its cargo in the field, then recall it, send it onward, form a camp, or gift its cargo to a friendly settlement.
Research-gated off the vanilla Shuttles project and built in the Odyssey architect category; each craft costs a rare ShuttleEngine (trader/reward only).
Multiplayer-compatible.
Portions of the materials used to create this content/mod are trademarks and/or copyrighted works of Ludeon Studios Inc. All rights reserved by Ludeon. This content/mod is not official and is not endorsed by Ludeon.
